text: One day in Paris, I love art and pastries.
Five days in Tokyo for ramen and Studio Ghibli vibes.
Long weekend in Lisbon, food and design.
Three days in Rome, packed itinerary, classical history focus.
Four days in Barcelona, vegetarian-friendly restaurants, mid-range budget.
Three days in Bangkok on a tight budget, street food and temples.
I have a 36-hour layover in Singapore. Make it count.
Two-week relaxed trip through Iceland for landscape photography.
I want a long weekend somewhere warm with art galleries and good coffee, surprise me.
Five days split between Berlin and Prague, history and beer.
